subsetDefs:
{
  "name": "first time in Hypertensive disorder gender 8507,8532 from 20200101 until 20241231",
  "definitionId": 1,
  "subsetOperators": [
    {
      "name": "in cohorts: (20128) where subset cohort start is within D: -99999 - D: 0 of target cohort start and subset cohort end is within D: 0 - D: 99999 of target cohort start",
      "subsetType": "CohortSubsetOperator",
      "cohortIds": [20128],
      "cohortCombinationOperator": "all",
      "negate": false,
      "windows": [
        {
          "startDay": -99999,
          "endDay": 0,
          "targetAnchor": "cohortStart",
          "subsetAnchor": "cohortStart",
          "negate": false
        },
        {
          "startDay": 0,
          "endDay": 99999,
          "targetAnchor": "cohortStart",
          "subsetAnchor": "cohortEnd",
          "negate": false
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "first ever occurence with at least 365 days prior observation and 1 days follow up observation",
      "subsetType": "LimitSubsetOperator",
      "priorTime": 365,
      "followUpTime": 1,
      "minimumCohortDuration": 0,
      "limitTo": "firstEver"
    },
    {
      "name": "males, females",
      "subsetType": "DemographicSubsetOperator",
      "ageMin": 0,
      "ageMax": 99999,
      "gender": [8507, 8532]
    },
    {
      "name": "occurs after 2020-01-01 and before 2024-12-31",
      "subsetType": "LimitSubsetOperator",
      "priorTime": 0,
      "followUpTime": 0,
      "minimumCohortDuration": 0,
      "limitTo": "all",
      "calendarStartDate": "2020-01-01",
      "calendarEndDate": "2024-12-31"
    }
  ],
  "packageVersion": "1.0.0.9000",
  "identifierExpression": "targetId * 1000 + definitionId",
  "operatorNameConcatString": ", ",
  "subsetCohortNameTemplate": "@baseCohortName - @subsetDefinitionName"
}
